artworks.title: Night Market
artworks.description: A vendor sits quietly amid the abundance of a night market, warm lamplight catching the textures of produce and the stillness of a face in repose.

artworks.title: Bloom
artworks.description: A cascading tree in full bloom commands the canvas, its drooping branches alive with impasto flecks of pink, white, and gold against a deep indigo ground.

artworks.title: Falling Rose
artworks.description: A single rose tips over in deep chiaroscuro, its dew-laden petals catching the only light in an otherwise velvet-dark ground — graphite worked to the softness of breath.

artworks.title: Anemone
artworks.description: A single anemone unfurls in sweeping ribbons of rose, lilac, and coral, its golden heart anchoring a storm of confident, painterly motion.

artworks.title: Mountain Mist
artworks.description: Soft ivory ridges fold over a fluid, mineral-green valley where ink-dark trees bloom like coral — an imagined landscape suspended between Eastern brush and abstraction.

artworks.title: Gilded
artworks.description: Veins of grey and indigo marble beneath a falling lattice of gold, the precious metal both caging and crowning the chaos it runs through.

artworks.title: Hold
artworks.description: Two weathered hands clasp at the centre of the frame, a quiet covenant rendered in warm, luminous skin against a hushed dark interior.

artworks.title: In the Studio
artworks.description: A clutch of oil portraits gathered on the studio floor beside an open paint box — works in progress caught in the unguarded light of where they were made.

artworks.title: I was getting coffee
artworks.description: A solitary figure lingers beneath a café staircase, the mundane ritual of waiting for coffee rendered tender through loose, gestural strokes of saturated colour.

artworks.title: The Singapore Sky
artworks.description: Pastel-hued apartment blocks rise against a luminous Singapore sky, the city's vertical geometry softened into something almost atmospheric and wistful.

artworks.title: 第二束玫瑰
artworks.description: A second bouquet of roses erupts in spiralling strokes of pink and green, each petal a small act of controlled chaos that tips into pure chromatic joy.

artworks.title: Untitled
artworks.description: An unsettling proximity forces the viewer into the tension between mouth and hand, the brushwork raw and visceral against a bruised, dark ground.

artworks.title: Reverie
artworks.description: A dreaming figure dissolves into a field of lotus blooms, her flowing hair merging with a wash of soft colour in a reverie that hovers between sketch and vision.
